# AI Gateway — full agent brief

OpenAI-compatible LLM gateway fronting free-tier models across multiple providers.

## Index

# AI Gateway (free-ai)

OpenAI-compatible gateway over free-tier models across providers.

## API

- Base: https://ai-gateway.sassmaker.com
- `GET /health`
- `GET /v1/models`
- Chat completions require API key (`GATEWAY_API_KEY`)

## Agent entrypoints

- https://ai-gateway.sassmaker.com/llms.txt
- https://ai-gateway.sassmaker.com/api/ai
- https://ai-gateway.sassmaker.com/index.md

## Product links

- Health: https://ai-gateway.sassmaker.com/health — Health probe
- Models: https://ai-gateway.sassmaker.com/v1/models — OpenAI-compatible models list

## Machine surfaces

- https://ai-gateway.sassmaker.com/llms.txt
- https://ai-gateway.sassmaker.com/llms-full.txt
- https://ai-gateway.sassmaker.com/api/ai
- https://ai-gateway.sassmaker.com/index.md
- https://ai-gateway.sassmaker.com/sitemap.xml
- https://ai-gateway.sassmaker.com/robots.txt

## Contact / fleet

- Fleet: https://sassmaker.com
- Agent email for directory verification: sarthakagrawal@agentmail.to
